title: 12th Angel Alternate Form Pachinko related
wikitext:
[]: 12th Angel Alternate Form? [Pachinko-related]             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Wed Aug 26, 2015 6:00 am In the Eva 9 pachinko game, one of the possible battle sequences has Unit 02 and Unit 01 fighting the 12th Angel in the skull-filled Central Dogma. You can see that here: https://youtu.be/IdysLUonSmE?t=10m49s The 12th Angel starts forming up into a tentacled mass like it does in the movie, but what caught my attention is the part where the two Evas leap into the air and strike its AT Field. There's a lot of glare and light reflection on the screen, but it looks like the Angel has a pretty clearly defined head and shoulders, with glowing red "eyes": SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Wed Aug 26, 2015 7:01 am Don't we all recall Angel No.12 taking the form of a human fetus after absorbing the remains of Lilith? Maybe it has something to do with that.

[]:             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Wed Aug 26, 2015 2:41 pm Good point! I've found a couple of sliiightly better quality videos, and they've helped resolve things a little. The stuff off to the right where the "shoulder" is is partly screen noise and partly a tendril in the background, so that part in the front is a stalk, but they still don't give a clear view of the upper part where the eye spots and "head" are. So right now, the verdict is:

chunks.content:
Article: 12th Angel Alternate Form Pachinko related
[]: 12th Angel Alternate Form? [Pachinko-related]             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Wed Aug 26, 2015 6:00 am In the Eva 9 pachinko game, one of the possible battle sequences has Unit 02 and Unit 01 fighting the 12th Angel in the skull-filled Central Dogma. You can see that here: https://youtu.be/IdysLUonSmE?t=10m49s The 12th Angel starts forming up into a tentacled mass like it does in the movie, but what caught my attention is the part where the two Evas leap into the air and strike its AT Field. There's a lot of glare and light reflection on the screen, but it looks like the Angel has a pretty clearly defined head and shoulders, with glowing red "eyes": SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Wed Aug 26, 2015 7:01 am Don't we all recall Angel No.12 taking the form of a human fetus after absorbing the remains of Lilith? Maybe it has something to do with that.

[]:             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Wed Aug 26, 2015 2:41 pm Good point! I've found a couple of sliiightly better quality videos, and they've helped resolve things a little. The stuff off to the right where the "shoulder" is is partly screen noise and partly a tendril in the background, so that part in the front is a stalk, but they still don't give a clear view of the upper part where the eye spots and "head" are. So right now, the verdict is:
